title: High Net Worth Centre Executive
description:
Location
Premium Lifestyle Mall

Job Summary:
The HNW Centre Executive will be primarily responsible for the end-to-end operations, coordination, and client experience of our High Net Worth (HNW) Centre.

This role is to ensure that the centre operates seamlessly within mall-designated hours, delivers private banking–level standards, and supports both corporate and agency-led activities.

Key Responsibilities:

1.     Centre Operations Management

  • Ensure the centre is operational during designated mall operating hours
  • Manage daily opening and closing readiness of the centre
  • Ensure the overall environment, professionalism, and service standards reflect a premium private banking experience

2. Events & Activities Coordination

  • Assist to coordinate all corporate and agency events held at the centre
  • Liaise with vendors and internal support teams to ensure smooth event delivery
  • Oversee event day operations including guest flow, room readiness, and on-site coordination

3. Meeting Room & Booking Oversight

  • Ensure that meeting room bookings are properly managed and executed
  • Ensure well-coordinated room reservations to ensure optimal utilisation and no booking conflicts
  • Ensure all meeting rooms are prepared and presented professionally prior to each session.

4. Client & Guest Experience Management

  • Personally usher guests, clients, and candidates into the holding area or meeting rooms when required
  • Ensure every guest experiences a seamless, warm, and professional welcome

Requirements & Attributes:

  • Minimum 1–2 years of relevant experience in hospitality, customer service, luxury retail, or lifestyle services
  • Fluent in English and Mandarin
  • Experience working with VIP or premium clientele is an advantage
  • Strong interpersonal and communication skills
  • Well-organised, detail-oriented, and service-focused
  • As the centre operates seven days a week, applicants must be willing to work shifts or participate in a rotating schedule.

postedCompany.description:
PFP Group Services Pte Ltd, a comprehensive shared services under SingWealth Holdings Pte Ltd, offers financial advisory firms an integrated digital and administrative platform. 


This platform delivers seamless middle-to-back-office support that can be scaled to meet their evolving business needs.


Our mission is to optimize the operations of financial advisory firms at every business stage, providing innovative solutions that empower financial advisers to focus on what matters most: their clients.
postedCompany.name: PFP GROUP SERVICES PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
